calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salceda.
Petitioner: John Powell, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Paris Vines.
THe Minor's mother: Spunisheia Chapple is also present, consented and signed the Petition in open court.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Paris J. Powell.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-23-2005 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Reset To Aug-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
